title: tinguarra cerviariifolia
intro: Tinguarra cerviariifolia, also known as the Tinguarra plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tinguarra cerviariifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
